item.title: The Case of Edwin: A Timeline of Events
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving Edwin, outlining the sequence of events, the investigation, and the legal outcome.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving Edwin, outlining the sequence of events, the investigation, and the legal outcome.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Case Involving a Boyfriend’s Hidden Secret
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving a relationship and undisclosed actions, focusing on verified events and the investigation.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving a relationship and undisclosed actions, focusing on verified events and the investigation.

item.title: The Case of Kouri Richins
item.description: A factual overview of the case involving Kouri Richins, focusing on the investigation, legal proceedings, and key developments reported so far.

item.title: Why were so many people OBSESSED with a murderer?
item.description: A look at the social and psychological factors that can lead to widespread public attention around certain criminal cases.

media:content.media:title: Why were so many people OBSESSED with a murderer?
media:content.media:description: A look at the social and psychological factors that can lead to widespread public attention around certain criminal cases.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Case Involving Husband’s Friend and Fiancée
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving a husband’s friend and a fiancée, focusing on confirmed events and the investigation process.

item.title: Mark Receives 48-Year Prison Sentence
item.description: A factual summary of the case and court decision, outlining the charges, legal process, and the sentence handed down.

item.title: A Tragedy That Might Have Been Prevented
item.description: A look at a recent incident with a focus on lessons learned and ways similar tragedies could be avoided in the future.

item.title: The Case of 2-Year-Old Caliyah Guyton
item.description: A respectful overview of the case involving Caliyah Guyton, focusing on confirmed facts, the investigation, and its broader impact on the community.

item.title: Surprise! Wade Wilson looks a little different now.
item.description: A factual update on Wade Wilson’s recent appearance, noting observable changes and key developments in the case proceedings.

item.title: Inside Wade Wilson’s Interrogation
item.description: A factual overview of Wade Wilson’s interrogation, focusing on investigative methods and key moments observed during questioning.
